ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* The organization or entity sponsoring the trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* The lead researcher or principal investigator of the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the trial is conducted */,
  "phase" TEXT /* The phase of the clinical trial (e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2) */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* The target population for the trial */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* The date when the trial started enrolling patients */,
  "planned_end_date" TEXT /* The planned end date of the trial */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* The actual end date of the trial */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* The version of the trial protocol */,
  "ethical_approval" INTEGER /* Whether the trial has received ethical approval */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* The source of funding for the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment agent */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the treatment agent */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* The regulatory approval status of the agent */,
  "approved_for_use" TEXT /* The conditions or diseases for which the agent is approved */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the agent */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the agent */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The expiry date of the agent batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial this treatment is associated with */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment agent */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., IV, oral) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the treatment ended */,
  "total_doses" INTEGER /* The total number of doses administered */,
  "administration_notes" TEXT /* Any specific notes or instructions for administration */,
  "adverse_events" TEXT /* Any adverse events observed during the treatment */,
  "compliance_rate" TEXT /* The rate of patient compliance with the treatment regimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment associated with this observation */,
  "days_post" INTEGER /* Days post-treatment when observation was recorded */,
  "bat" INTEGER /* Blood assay test value (BAT) */,
  "lh" INTEGER /* Liver health (LH) test value */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the patient for whom the observation was recorded */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* The type of observation (e.g., vital signs, blood tests) */,
  "value_unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the observation value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who recorded the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the trial data */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the access session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the report is generated from */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., interim, final) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* The approval status of the report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* The date the report was reviewed */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the report */,
  "confidentiality_level" TEXT /* The confidentiality level of the report (e.g., public, confidential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
